description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows, each running on a different environment and building the project in both Release and Debug configurations. For build-linux, use an ubuntu-latest environment, install dependencies, set up Rust, generate a build system with CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact. For build-windows, use a windows-2019 environment, install Rust and Boost, generate a build system with CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact.
